vendor_risk_snapshot: City Water Pump Services (82/100 risk, likely_fraud)
final_connected_summary.summary: The high-risk cases do not look isolated. Rahman Steel & Iron, Swift Cargo BD, Bengal Safety Gear, Northstar Survey Services, Strata Consult BD, Bismillah Cement Co., Padma Equipment Rental, Meghna Sand & Aggregates, OfficeLease Holdings, Bengal Compressor Rental, Eastern Fuel Station, Jamuna Paints & Coatings, Ruposhi Stationery, Shapla Timber Traders, Sonargaon Tiles Depot, Sundarban Transport Agency, TechPoint IT Support, Capital Crane Service, Crescent Electrical, Karnaphuli Rebar Cutters, Metro Labour Supply, Mitali Catering, Prime Lab Testing, Apex Buildmart, BlueRiver Janitorial, Central Printing House, City Water Pump Services, Delta Pipes & Fittings, Dhaka Legal Associates, Eastern Scaffold Ltd., Greenline ReadyMix, Metro Security Services, Oriental Glass Supply, Riverbank GeoTextile, Skyline Hardware, Utility Marking BD were all escalated as likely fraud, and the same named parties appear across more than one of those vendor cases: Imran Ahmed, Shaila Rahman, Nusrat Karim, Tariq Molla, Rafiq Hossain. That overlap suggests the suspicious activity may have moved through a shared internal approval or payment-processing route, rather than three unrelated vendor problems. In plain terms: Apex shows direct payment-document manipulation, while the other high-risk vendors show structured or fabricated-looking billing patterns. The repeated people across those cases are the connective tissue that makes this look coordinated.
final_connected_summary.relationship_theory: The likely relationship is a shared actor network: the same internal parties appear around multiple high-risk vendors, which points to coordination across procurement, approval, and payment handling. This does not by itself prove personal guilt, but it identifies exactly whose approval trail, inbox history, and vendor onboarding records should be reviewed first.
recommended_confirmation_steps: Compare approval chains across the high-risk vendors.
Check whether the shared parties touched invoice approval, payment release, or vendor onboarding.
Review email timestamps against payment dates and document-upload dates.
Confirm vendor ownership, bank account ownership, and any personal links between vendor contacts and internal staff.
